From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-26 16:53 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
Date: 2024-02-07 12:28 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Tailspin Toys consumption trend

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-28 10:10 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Tailspin Toys

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Tailspin Toys
Date: 2024-02-07
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is consumption trend.

[00:05:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:09:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:12:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:14:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is budget approval.

[00:19:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:21:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:26:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:30:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:35:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.
